description: Browse and query SQLite databases inside VS Code.
viewsContainer.title: Anytime Database
config.openMode.title: Open Mode
config.openMode.description: How to open SQLite files. 'readwrite' allows write SQL and dirty/save UX. 'readonly' opens with OPEN_READONLY and rejects mutations.
config.queryMaxRows.title: Query Max Rows
config.queryMaxRows.description: Maximum number of rows displayed for SQL Run results. Larger results are truncated with a warning banner.
config.warnThresholdMs.title: Warn Threshold (ms)
config.warnThresholdMs.description: Show a warning when a query takes longer than this number of milliseconds.
config.backup.generations: Number of gzip-compressed backup generations to keep for `trail.db`. Each generation is stored as `.bak.N.gz` next to the database file. Range: 1–10.
config.backup.intervalDays: Minimum interval in days between backups of `trail.db`. `0` = backup every session. `1` (default) = at most once per day. Higher values reduce backup frequency.
config.s3.bucket.description: AWS S3 bucket name to upload backup generations to. Leave empty to disable S3 upload.
config.s3.region.description: AWS region of the S3 bucket (e.g. ap-northeast-1).
config.s3.prefix.description: Key prefix under the bucket. Final key is `<prefix>/<dbName>/<ISO timestamp>.bak.gz`.
config.s3.accessKeyId.description: AWS IAM access key ID. **Recommend storing in User Settings**: committing this to a workspace `.vscode/settings.json` may leak credentials via git.
config.s3.secretAccessKey.description: AWS IAM secret access key. **Recommend storing in User Settings**: committing this to a workspace `.vscode/settings.json` may leak credentials via git.
